claim_note: Real on-device offline streaming ZH/EN bilingual ASR via native sherpa-onnx. NOT a launch-support claim; support matrix still requires WS6 benchmark evidence.

model.kind: online transducer (streaming zipformer, bilingual ZH+EN, int8)
model.decoded_text_partial: TODAY IS LIBR THE DAY AFTER TOMORROW是星期三
model.decoded_source: Real bilingual ZH+EN model decoding test_wavs/0.wav (16-bit PCM, mono, 16 kHz, 10.05 s) fed frame-by-frame through SherpaOnnxAsrProvider.accept(). Output mixes Chinese characters and English words — expected for colloquial bilingual speech.
